description: As Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider, password: Provider1234!), document physical exam findings for patient Robert Thompson (DOB: 07/22/1958) in today's 'Routine health maintenance examination' encounter. Record the following findings in the Physical Exam section: General: Well-developed, well-nourished, alert and oriented, in no acute distress; HEENT: Normocephalic, atraumatic, pupils equal, round, reactive to light and accommodation, oropharynx clear without erythema or exudates; Neck: Supple, no lymphadenopathy, no thyromegaly, no JVD; Cardiovascular: Regular rate and rhythm, S1 and S2 normal, no murmurs, rubs, or gallops; Lungs: Clear to auscultation bilaterally, no wheezes, rales, or rhonchi; Abdomen: Soft, non-tender, non-distended, normoactive bowel sounds, no hepatosplenomegaly.
